title: SCP-049_Modification (Deprecated)
body:
Modification about scp-049 adds spc armor (you can open mask using numpad0 if you have one on head) add scp that is boss. It adds a zombie syrgine too that gives wither and slowness effect when attacked entity. Ofcourse thanks for downloading :).

-- New Version will come out in future. I promise. But now im working on a different mod --
